props.title: About Adman Electric
props.description: For over 25 years, we've been powering progress across industrial, commercial, retail, and healthcare sectors with innovative electrical solutions and unwavering commitment to excellence.

props.title: Our Story
copy: Founded in 2001 by a team of experienced electricians with a vision to provide superior electrical contracting services, PowerTech Electric has grown from a small local contractor to a regional leader serving multiple states.

Our growth has been driven by our commitment to quality, safety, and client satisfaction. We've built our reputation one project at a time, earning the trust of facility managers, general contractors, and property owners across diverse industries.

Today, with over 200 skilled professionals and multiple divisions specializing in everything from heavy industrial to precision low-voltage systems, we continue to innovate and adapt to meet the evolving needs of our clients.
props.subtitle: Key Milestones

milestones.event: PowerTech Electric founded with a team of 5 electricians
Opened second regional office, grew to 50+ employees
Launched Low Voltage and Data Center divisions
Now serving 7 states with 200+ skilled professionals

cards.title: Excellence

cards.description: Building lasting relationships with clients, partners, and our community.

cards.title: Innovation
cards.description: Embracing new technologies and methods to deliver better solutions.

cards.title: Integrity
cards.description: Honest, transparent, and ethical in all our business practices.
